props.ChoiceText: The beast took the lance meant for you, and afterward mounted glory seemed less abstract.
props.ChoiceBio: A horse killed under you taught you that cavalry splendor has a breathing cost.

0.TransitionText: Because a horse killed under you taught you that cavalry splendor has a breathing cost, the matter only confirmed your place among the knightly.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a horse killed under you taught you that cavalry splendor has a breathing cost, you were carried into the speed, rank, and danger of the cavalry.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a horse killed under you taught you that cavalry splendor has a breathing cost, command ceased to be an accident of rank and became the center of your life.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
